prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `05a7bcf2`.
codex_response:
Implemented `05a7bcf2` as a new ARC2 task package. The verifier in [verifier.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_05a7bcf2/verifier.py#L4) normalizes the puzzle to a canonical “vertical divider, `4` on the left” form, then applies the row/column rule: original `4`s become `3`, the gap to the `8` divider is filled with `4`, the span through the divider is filled with `8`, and the aligned `2` count is packed to the far border. The generator in [generator.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_05a7bcf2/generator.py#L46) builds a full histogram-like `2` object, samples small `4` components on a subset of rows/columns, and rotates/mirrors the pair across all four orientations so the distribution matches the official family.

I used the Opus summary as a starting hint and discarded the Sonnet summary; the correction is recorded in [notes.md](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_05a7bcf2/notes.md#L1). No new shared primitive was needed. Official verification passed `4/4`, and all `1000` built examples re-verified against the task verifier.
